name: UX feedback
about: Capture beta workflow, copy, layout, and navigation feedback
title: "[UX] "
labels: ux-feedback
assignees: ""
---

## Safety Check

- [ ] No passwords, tokens, auth headers, secrets, real customer data, or document bodies are included.
- [ ] Screenshots/videos are redacted.

## Context

- Route/page:
- Workflow step:
- Browser/device:
- Screen width or device size:

## Feedback

- What felt confusing or slow?
- What did you expect to happen?
- What wording, layout, or navigation change would help?

## Classification

- Severity: High / Medium / Low
- Issue type: UX confusion / Mobile layout / Report wording / PDF-document concern / Other
- Blocks beta usage: Yes / No

## Evidence

- Redacted screenshot/video reference:
- Notes:
